q_test1.currentAnswer: Based on current search results, there is no confirmed announcement of Revolut partnering with any airport lounge in Tel Aviv. Revolut offers airport lounge access through third-party aggregators (such as DragonPass/LoungeKey) at Ben Gurion Airport as part of its broader travel benefits, but no new, specific direct partnership with a Tel Aviv lounge has been announced.
q_test1.currentSummary: No confirmed new Revolut–Tel Aviv airport lounge partnership
